title: FDA Commissioner Resigns Following Period of Political Pressure
subtitle: Marty Makary leaves his post after 13 months of conflict over vaccines, vapes, and drug regulations.

summary.en: Marty Makary has resigned as the commissioner of the US Food and Drug Administration after a difficult 13-month period. His time at the agency was marked by disagreements with the White House, lawmakers, and industry leaders. President Trump confirmed the resignation, naming Kyle Diamantas as the temporary replacement. Makary faced pressure regarding the approval of flavored vapes and the regulation of abortion medication. The future of his many policy changes remains uncertain as the agency looks for new leadership.
summary.zh: 馬卡里在經歷了艱難的十三個月後，辭去了美國食品藥物管理局局長的職務。他在任內與白宮、國會議員及業界領袖之間衝突不斷。川普總統證實了這項辭職消息，並任命戴曼塔斯為代理局長。馬卡里在任內面臨關於核准調味電子煙及管制墮胎藥物的壓力。隨著該機構尋求新領導層，他所推動的多項政策未來仍充滿不確定性。

paragraphs.en: Marty Makary, the commissioner of the US Food and Drug Administration (FDA), resigned from his position on Tuesday. His departure comes after a 13-month period at the agency that saw frequent disagreements with the White House, members of Congress, and the public. President Donald Trump confirmed the news, stating that while Makary was a talented doctor, he was having some difficulty in the role. Kyle Diamantas, who previously led the agency’s food policy, has been named as the acting commissioner.
paragraphs.zh: 美國食品藥物管理局（FDA）局長馬卡里（Marty Makary）於週二辭去職務。他在該機構任職十三個月期間，與白宮、國會議員及大眾頻繁發生意見分歧。川普總統證實了這項消息，並表示馬卡里雖然是一位才華洋溢的醫師，但在擔任此職位時遇到了一些困難。先前負責該機構食品政策的戴曼塔斯（Kyle Diamantas）已被任命為代理局長。

paragraphs.en: According to The Guardian Health, Makary’s time at the FDA was defined by several controversial decisions. One major point of conflict involved the approval of fruit-flavored vapes. Reports from the Wall Street Journal suggest that President Trump had signed off on a plan to fire Makary after the commissioner initially refused to approve these products. Although Makary eventually allowed the vapes to move forward, the delay caused significant tension between him and the White House.
paragraphs.zh: 根據《衛報健康版》（The Guardian Health）報導，馬卡里的局長任期以多項具爭議性的決策為人所知。其中一個主要的衝突點涉及水果口味電子煙的核准問題。據《華爾街日報》報導，在馬卡里最初拒絕核准這些產品後，川普總統曾簽署了一項將其解職的計畫。儘管馬卡里最終放行了這些電子煙，但此延宕已造成他與白宮之間的嚴重緊張關係。

paragraphs.en: Beyond vaping, Makary faced pressure from various sides. MedPage Today reports that pharmaceutical companies were unhappy with what they called inconsistent reviews of their products. Meanwhile, conservative members of Congress criticized Makary for his handling of mifepristone, a medication used for abortion. These lawmakers accused him of slowing down the review process for the drug. Additionally, Makary had to manage the interests of Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr., who has been very vocal about his concerns regarding the safety of vaccines and food additives.
paragraphs.zh: 除了電子煙議題外，馬卡里還面臨來自各方的壓力。《MedPage Today》報導指出，製藥公司對於他們所謂「審查標準不一致」感到不滿。同時，保守派國會議員批評馬卡里處理墮胎藥物美服培酮（mifepristone）的方式，指控他拖延該藥物的審查程序。此外，馬卡里還必須處理衛生與公共服務部部長小羅伯特·甘迺迪（Robert F. Kennedy Jr.）的關切，後者對於疫苗及食品添加物的安全性一直抱持強烈質疑。

paragraphs.en: Makary’s leadership also saw significant changes within the agency itself. There was high turnover among top officials, including the firing and later re-hiring of Vinay Prasad, who served as the director of the FDA’s Center for Biologics Evaluation and Research. Makary introduced several new initiatives, such as changing the number of required studies for drug approval from two to one and using new statistical methods for clinical trials. However, MedPage Today notes that many of these programs have not gone through the official federal rulemaking process. This means they could be easily overturned by the next leader of the agency.
paragraphs.zh: 在馬卡里的領導下，該機構內部也經歷了重大變革。高層官員流動率極高，包括曾任FDA生物製劑評估與研究中心主任的普拉薩德（Vinay Prasad）遭解職後又被重新聘用。馬卡里推動了多項新措施，例如將藥物核准所需的臨床研究數量從兩項減為一項，並在臨床試驗中採用新的統計方法。然而，《MedPage Today》指出，這些計畫中有許多並未經過正式的聯邦法規制定程序，這意味著它們極可能被下一任局長輕易推翻。

paragraphs.en: Vaccine policy remained one of the most contentious areas during Makary’s tenure. Critics, including former acting FDA commissioner Janet Woodcock, argued that the agency showed a pattern of hiding information that supported vaccine safety. For example, the FDA stopped the publication of research on vaccines for shingles and Covid. There was also a public backlash after the agency refused to consider a new flu vaccine from Moderna, a decision that was later reversed. Peter Lurie, a former associate commissioner at the FDA, stated that the administration likely realized they had gone too far regarding vaccine recommendations as the midterm elections approached.
paragraphs.zh: 疫苗政策在馬卡里任內始終是最具爭議的領域之一。包括前FDA代理局長伍德考克（Janet Woodcock）在內的批評者認為，該機構出現了隱瞞支持疫苗安全性資訊的模式。例如，FDA曾停止發布關於帶狀疱疹疫苗與新冠疫苗的研究。此外，在該機構拒絕審查莫德納（Moderna）研發的新型流感疫苗後，引發了公眾強烈反彈，該決定隨後被撤銷。前FDA副局長盧里（Peter Lurie）表示，隨著期中選舉臨近，行政部門可能意識到他們在疫苗建議方面的做法太過火了。

paragraphs.en: In a text shared by President Trump on social media, Makary expressed pride in his work. He highlighted that he had announced 50 major reforms, including reducing the time it takes to review new drugs from one year to just one or two months. He also mentioned new guidance for the use of psychedelics and changes to labels for menopausal hormone replacement therapy. Despite these claims of success, the atmosphere at the FDA remained unstable throughout his time in office.
paragraphs.zh: 在川普總統於社群媒體分享的一則訊息中，馬卡里表達了對自己工作的自豪。他強調自己宣布了五十項重大改革，包括將新藥審查時間從一年縮短至僅一到兩個月。他也提到了關於迷幻藥使用的新指引，以及更動更年期荷爾蒙替代療法的標籤說明。儘管他聲稱取得了這些成就，但FDA內部的氣氛在他任職期間始終處於不穩定狀態。

paragraphs.en: As Makary leaves, the question of what comes next for the FDA remains open. While Kyle Diamantas is currently the acting head, other names have been mentioned as potential permanent replacements. According to reports from Axios, these include former assistant secretary for health Brett Giroir and former FDA commissioner Stephen Hahn. Makary is the second major health agency head to leave the administration, following the departure of CDC Director Susan Monarez last August. For now, the agency faces a period of uncertainty as it waits to see which of Makary’s policies will stay and which will be changed by his successor.
paragraphs.zh: 隨著馬卡里離職，FDA的未來動向仍充滿未知。雖然戴曼塔斯目前擔任代理局長，但已有其他名字被提及作為潛在的正式接班人選。根據《Axios》報導，人選包括前衛生部助理部長吉羅伊（Brett Giroir）與前FDA局長哈恩（Stephen Hahn）。馬卡里是繼去年八月疾病管制與預防中心（CDC）主任莫納雷斯（Susan Monarez）離職後，第二位離開現任政府的重大衛生機構首長。目前，該機構正處於一段不確定時期，等待觀察馬卡里的哪些政策將被保留，哪些又會被繼任者修改。

keyTerms.definitionEn: To officially approve a plan or action.
keyTerms.noteZh: 此片語在商業或行政語境中常用，表示核准。文中：Reports from the Wall Street Journal suggest that President Trump had signed off on a plan to fire Makary after the commissioner initially refused to approve these products.

keyTerms.definitionEn: The rate at which employees leave a workforce and are replaced.
keyTerms.noteZh: 此詞常指銷售額，這裡指組織內人員更迭頻繁。文中：There was high turnover among top officials, including the firing and later re-hiring of Vinay Prasad, who served as the director of the FDA’s Center for Biologics Evaluation and Research.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To be officially accepted or approved by a process.
keyTerms.noteZh: 這裡指政策未完成官方審核流程。文中：However, MedPage Today notes that many of these programs have not gone through the official federal rulemaking process.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To exceed the limits of what is acceptable or reasonable.
keyTerms.noteZh: 形容行為超出了適當的範圍。文中：Peter Lurie, a former associate commissioner at the FDA, stated that the administration likely realized they had gone too far regarding vaccine recommendations as the midterm elections approached.

sources.name: The Guardian Health
sources.title: Marty Makary departs FDA after clashes with Trump over fruit-flavored vapes

quiz.question: What was the primary reason for the initial tension between Marty Makary and the White House?

options.A: His decision to fire Vinay Prasad from the agency.
options.B: His initial refusal to approve fruit-flavored vaping products.
options.C: His criticism of Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s views on food additives.
options.D: His failure to speed up the review process for mifepristone.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第二段，Makary 與白宮之間的緊張關係源於他起初拒絕批准水果口味的電子煙產品，儘管他後來妥協，但此延遲已造成雙方嚴重摩擦。選項 A 是關於內部人事異動，非與白宮衝突主因；選項 C 中 Makary 是管理 RFK Jr. 的利益，而非公開批評；選項 D 的 mifepristone 爭議是來自國會議員的批評，而非白宮直接造成的首要衝突。

quiz.question: Based on the article, what is the likely future of the policy changes introduced by Makary?

options.A: They will remain in place because they were officially approved by Congress.
options.B: They are expected to be permanent since they were implemented over 13 months.
options.C: They are at risk of being reversed because they bypassed official rulemaking processes.
options.D: They will likely be expanded by the next FDA commissioner to ensure stability.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。文章第四段指出，Makary 推出的許多改革並未經過正式的聯邦規則制定程序（federal rulemaking process），因此下一任領導人可以輕易推翻這些政策。選項 A 錯誤，因為文章明確說未經正式程序；選項 B 錯誤，時間長短與政策是否具有法律約束力無關；選項 D 屬於過度推論，文章並未暗示繼任者會擴大這些政策，反而強調了局勢的不確定性。

quiz.question: In the context of the article, what does the word 'contentious' mean in the phrase 'Vaccine policy remained one of the most contentious areas'?

options.A: Causing a lot of disagreement and argument.
options.B: Extremely complicated and difficult to understand.
options.C: Highly successful and widely praised by experts.
options.D: Secretive and hidden from the general public.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 A。Contentious 在此處意指「引起爭議的」或「容易引發辯論的」。文章第五段提到疫苗政策引發了包括前任官員在內的批評，且有資訊隱匿與拒絕考慮新疫苗等爭議，顯示該領域充滿衝突。選項 B 強調的是複雜度而非爭議；選項 C 與文章描述的批評與反彈背道而馳；選項 D 雖然提到隱匿資訊，但 contentious 本身是指爭論性質，而非僅指保密行為。

quiz.question: What is the central theme of the article regarding Marty Makary’s tenure at the FDA?

options.A: A successful transformation of the FDA into a more efficient, drug-approving agency.
options.B: A period of instability and conflict driven by controversial policies and leadership challenges.
options.C: The personal rivalry between Marty Makary and President Donald Trump.
options.D: The history of vaccine policy changes in the United States over the last decade.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。整篇文章從 Makary 的辭職切入，詳細描述了他在任期內與白宮、國會及藥廠的衝突，以及內部人事動盪與政策的不確定性，總結了他任期內充滿動盪的特質。選項 A 過度美化，忽略了文章中提到的爭議與不穩定；選項 C 將焦點縮小至個人恩怨，忽略了更廣泛的政策與行政問題；選項 D 錯誤，文章僅討論 Makary 任期內的疫苗政策，而非十年間的歷史。
